content: A new member of the Japan Football Association, Anri Teieri, addresses a board meeting regarding the team's recent failure in the World Cup and the need for a new plan.
The President of the JFA explains that the national football team is treated as a business to generate profits while maintaining a positive image.
A group of men are laughing and reminiscing about a past event while a serious character delivers a passionate speech about the current state of Japanese sports.
A character declares that they will never win the World Cup, while others express shock and disbelief at the possibility of Japan winning.
A character passionately declares their intent to create the ultimate player who can win the tournament against Japan.
A female character is shouting a name while pointing at a screen showing a man's photo, with other characters reacting to the announcement.
A soccer match is in progress with fans cheering enthusiastically
A soccer player in a white jersey is being aggressively tackled by two opponents in black jerseys while running with the ball.

A soccer player is shown in a moment of high intensity, surrounded by the word "NATIONAL!" and then depicted in a close-up with a determined expression, followed by a scene of him running alongside another player, both focused on the game.
A soccer player is about to take a shot against the goalkeeper, while the goalkeeper is thinking about the championship and national team.
A soccer player is shown in a moment of high intensity, preparing to make a crucial pass while his teammates cheer him on.
A coach yells at Isagi to play with all his heart, while Isagi reflects on the true meaning of football.
A soccer player in a white jersey with the number 11 is shown in a dynamic pose, kicking a soccer ball, with text in French that translates to "A sport played by 11..."
A soccer player scores a goal, causing the goalkeeper to fall into the net and the team to react with shock and disbelief.
A soccer player in a black uniform with the number 10 is shown in action, kicking a ball with great force and focus.
A soccer player scores a goal, leading to a final score of 0-2 and a sense of defeat.
The page depicts a soccer team celebrating a hard-fought victory, with text confirming they won 2-0 and earned a spot in the national championship.
A young soccer player gives a press conference, expressing his determination to win the national championship with his team.
A coach delivers a somber farewell speech to a soccer team, reminding them of their shared memories and the pain of their final defeat.
A soccer team, led by a crying captain, declares that nothing is lost in life and that their school will always be in his eyes, while another character calls them the best team in Japan.
A character reflects on the failure of his team while apologizing to another character named Noa.
A young soccer player is shown in action, kicking the ball with intense focus and determination, while another player looks on in the background.
The page depicts a passionate memory of Isagi playing soccer with his friends in the past, contrasting with his current reflection on his dream of becoming a professional player.
A soccer player celebrates winning the World Cup with confetti falling around him
A soccer player reflects on his past, imagining what might have happened if he had made different choices during a game.
The page depicts a soccer match where a goal is scored, followed by a close-up of a character's shocked face and a reflection of the opposing player's angry expression.
A character reflects on the past, imagining how their life might have been different if they had chosen to play football instead of collecting cards.
A character is shown in a moment of physical exertion, with a speech bubble indicating a desire to win, while another panel shows a figure in a dynamic pose.
A character returns home and is greeted by family while discussing food and football
A character receives a letter about a player improvement project and reacts with surprise while others discuss it.
A character is shown reacting with shock and disbelief to discovering a hidden camera while trying to find a meeting location.
